changes: PRD complete: 11 active FRs with 90 atomic acceptance criteria, 7 measurable NFRs, 5 P1 use cases, and 18 planned verification intents; formalized calendar-month identity, trusted period state, immutable draft and activation lifecycle, category safety, replay behavior, exact current-corrected position semantics, public LEDGER and read-only INSIGHTS boundaries, agent contract, local privacy, canonical operation and authority/seed vocabulary, and CHANNELS-owned UI deferral; all 8 questions resolved, coverage healthy, export coherent, dependency tests linked, and fresh graph-only requirements review approved.
